title: The RAG Pipeline
author: Zachary Proser
description: A complete working drawing of retrieval-augmented generation: ingestion, chunking, hybrid search, reranking, context assembly, evaluation, and failure handling.

blueprint.subject: RETRIEVAL
blueprint.subtitle: A language model can write from evidence only after a retrieval system finds, ranks, budgets, and delivers the right evidence.
rfiSuggestions: How do I tell a retrieval failure from a generation failure?
When does hybrid search beat dense retrieval?
Which RAG metrics belong in a production dashboard?
